name: Delta Lake
description: Delta Lake is a framework for storing data, handling time travel with ease, supporting parquet.

name: Apache Iceberg
description: Iceberg tables are a format for storing data in a big data processing friendly way, handling schema updates and time-travel with ease, supporting multiple formats such as parquet, avro, etc.

name: Databricks Feature Store
description: Databricks Feature Store is part of the Databricks suite of ML tools that allows for hosting of ML features for batch inference, training sets, and online low latency retrieval. This should be considered as a strong alternative to AWS Sagemaker Feature Store, which is not well invested in (or at least hasn't been in the last 4 years we've been using it), and ties better into tooling the Data Scientists are using

name: AWS SageMaker Endpoint Canary Traffic Shift
description: SageMaker Endpoint Canary Traffic Shift allows deployment of new models with confidence, with configurable and custom Cloudwatch alarms to determine whether a new endpoint should be rolled back.

name: DiskBBQ
description: DiskBBQis an indexing option with Elastic that allows for improved indexing time, and reduced storage.

name: Kaizen
description:
Owner: Tess Hoad

Kaizen is the concept of continuous team improvement, with one dedicated day every two weeks for members of the team to contribute to the betterment of the team, by improving processes or code bases, experimenting with new features, and learning new things
